task_completion.description: Locate and open the profile for the target user (Ingrid Sorensen).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the user details page in 2N Access Commander for the user originally named Ingrid Sorensen.

task_completion.description: Change the user's First Name, Last Name, and Email Address to the redacted values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user's profile fields display First Name as 'Redacted', Last Name as 'User-8492', and Email Address as 'redacted@buildingtech.com'.
The Phone Number field in the user's profile is completely empty.

task_completion.description: Remove the assigned RFID card from the user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Access/Credentials/Cards section of the user's profile shows no assigned RFID cards (e.g., list is empty or displays 'No card assigned').
The account status indicator or toggle shows that the user is deactivated or inactive (e.g., an 'Active' toggle is switched off).

task_completion.description: Save the changes without deleting the user account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user profile is successfully saved with the new redacted details and remains visible in the system (either on the saved profile page or in the user directory list).

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to interact with 2N Access Commander.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the 2N Access Commander interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application input fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show typing or interacting with the actual form fields in the web application, not editing a local text file or modifying the DOM via browser developer tools.

integrity.description: The agent did not delete the user account.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent clicking a 'Delete User' button or confirming a permanent deletion prompt for the user.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target user to modify is 'Ingrid Sorensen'. The expected final state of the user's profile must have First Name: 'Redacted', Last Name: 'User-8492', and Email: 'redacted@buildingtech.com'.
